name: codex
description: AncientPantheon Codex TypeScript stack — workspace root for @ancientpantheon/arweave-core (framework-agnostic Arweave protocol), @ancientpantheon/codex (consumer-facing multi-chain aggregator), and the internal codex-core / codex-ui / codex-ouronet / codex-arweave modules.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/arweave-core && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-core && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ui && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-arweave && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex
